Hunters of Eternal Hunt
The official NFT character collection powering Eternal Hunt
📊 Collection Details
Total Supply8,888 Hunters
ClassesWolves & Hunters
Rarity TiersCommon · Rare · Epic · Legendary
Mint Price250 $HUNT
🎮 Utility
Every Hunter NFT is a fully playable character with on-chain stats (ATK / SPD / DEF). Rarity determines base stats — Legendary Hunters hit hardest and move fastest. Ownership unlocks the character permanently in-game.
